message:
refactor(vdbe): promote restore_concurrent_page_state to associated fn and apply clippy lints

Remove the unused `&self` receiver from `SharedTxnPageIo::
restore_concurrent_page_state`, converting all call-sites from
`self.restore_concurrent_page_state(...)` to `Self::...`.  The method
never accessed instance state and the old signature prevented calling it
from contexts where a mutable borrow was already held.

Also apply minor clippy fixes: `is_none_or` replaces the `is_none() ||
is_some_and()` pattern in `resolve_join_column`, a closure is replaced
with a function pointer in `expr_has_window`, and redundant double-deref
on Blob values is simplified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
